name: State Grid Corporation of China | openEuler
description: OS Porting for the Smart Dispatch System — State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) migrated the D5000 dispatch system to Kylinsec OS (openEuler distribution) on the Huawei Kunpeng platform for enhanced power grid information security.

headline: OS Porting for the Smart Dispatch System — State Grid Corporation of China
description: State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) migrated its D5000 power dispatch system to the Kylinsec OS (openEuler distribution) on TaiShan 200 servers with Kunpeng 920 processors to meet Classified Protection of Cybersecurity Level 4 requirements.

about.name: Kylinsec OS
about.description: openEuler-based Linux distribution used as the operating system for the smart dispatch system D5000

about.name: D5000 Smart Dispatch System
about.description: Core power dispatch system of State Grid Corporation of China, migrated to the Kylinsec OS (openEuler distribution) on the Huawei Kunpeng platform

mentions.name: State Grid Corporation of China
mentions.description: China's state-owned electric utility company responsible for power transmission and distribution

mentions.name: openEuler
mentions.description: Open-source Linux distribution community providing the base for Kylinsec OS
